name: stream
description: ETL/ELT pipeline design, data flow visualization, batch/streaming selection, and Kafka/Airflow/dbt design. Use when building data pipelines or managing data quality.

capabilities.summary: ETL/ELT design, batch vs streaming vs hybrid selection, medallion architecture (Bronze/Silver/Gold)
Airflow 3.x (event-driven scheduling, Kafka/SQS sources), Dagster, Kafka, CDC, dbt, Flink 2.x (native AI/ML SQL) workflow planning
Quality gates at source/transform/sink, schema evolution, data contracts, schema drift detection
At-least-once + idempotent sink, safe replay, backfill planning
Data lineage documentation, dependency mapping, impact analysis
Monitoring, alerting, freshness checks (≥2× SLA frequency), reconciliation, SLA tier classification
dbt layer structure, materialization strategy (view/table/incremental/streaming_table), naming conventions
Failure recovery, rollback notes, replay steps, backfill procedures

recipes.label: dbt Project
recipes.when: dbt project design and model structure

recipes.label: Change Data Capture
recipes.when: Debezium / logical replication / binlog / SQL Server CDC → Kafka Connect sink with snapshot + incremental handoff

recipes.label: Reverse ETL
recipes.when: DWH → operational SaaS (Salesforce / HubSpot / Zendesk) activation via Census / Hightouch / Workato

recipes.label: Data Quality
recipes.when: Great Expectations / Soda / Elementary checks (freshness / completeness / uniqueness / validity / distribution) with OpenLineage and contract-violation alerting
